data.body: Thread A (docs): 'Two writers, one store' architecture section + docstring signposts on event_append.py, import_ndjson.py, inbound_translate.py, applier.py. Corrected a false premise (reconciler does NOT batch inbound commits via commit_tree; _apply_batch is outbound Jira REST; _write_event_file writes one file no-commit). Plan-review passed+signed after 3 remediation rounds. make lint+typecheck green. Pushed as Gerrit #452 (ticket f0df-2a45-8153-4da0).
